verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Moses leh Samuel nangawn ka mai-ah hong dingin hong thum uh zongin hih mite ka hehpih tuan kei ding hi. Ka muhna panin hawlkhia un la, paikhia sak un

Amaute in, ‘Koi-ah pai ding ka hi uh hiam?’ ci-in hong dot uh leh hih bangin genkik in: ‘ Topa in, “Pulnatna tawh a si dingte pul-in si ding uh a, namsau tawh a si dingte namsau-in si ding uh hi. Kial tawh a puksi dingte kial-in si ding uh a, sala kikai dingte zong sal-in kikai ding uh hi,” a ci hi,’ va ci in
“Amaute' sihna dingin gimna nam li ka tungsak ding hi. A kithahna ding uh namsau, a keizan gawp dingin ui, a valhtum ding leh a susiagawp dingin huih laka vasate leh leilaka ganhingte ka koih ding hi
Judah kumpi Hezekiah' tapa Manasseh in Jerusalem khua-ah hih bangin a bawl thu leitung gam khempeuhte in mu-in a lau ding uh hi
“Kua in nang hong hehpih ding ahi hiam? Jerusalem aw, kua in nang hong kah ding ahi hiam? Kua, hong lambaangin, damlenat kitheihsakna-in hong hawh ding ahi hiam
Nangmah in kei nong taisanzo hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Kei nong nungngat niloh hi. Tua ahih manin ka khut zanin nang kong susia hi. Ka hehna ka ki-ipzo nawn kei hi

Na gamsung khua kongpite-ah huihpi' mut bangin note kong mutmang ding hi. Na tate uh ka beisak ding a, ka mite ka susia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na gitlohna uh leh na omdan hoihlo panun na kiheikik kei uh hi

Tuipi-a sehnel omzah sangin nupi meigong ka tamsakzaw ding hi. Na tangvalte uh a khan' laitakin ka that ding a, a nute uh ka lunggimsak ding hi. Note' tungah thakhat thu-in lungkhamna leh launa ka hong tungsak ding hi

Ta sagih a nei nupi khakham vei-in a sibup hi. Sunkimlai hinapi ama-a' dingin khuamial bang a, maizumna leh mindaina a thuak hi. No a nungta laite na galte un namsau tawh a hong satlup dingun ka hong pia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a hong ci hi

Gimna ka thuak hi; ka nu aw, gamsung khempeuh-a mite tawh a kitawng a kisel dingin kei nong suaksak hi. Ka sumte kuamah lah leitawisak loin kuama-a' lah leitawi lalo napi, a vekpi-un kei hong hamsiat teitei uh hi

Topa aw, amaute' hoihna dingin nang tungah kong thumsak kei a, gimna leh haksatna hun ciangin ka galte-a' dingin nang' tungah kong ngetsak kei leh tua amau' hong hamsiatnate kei' tungah hong tung ta hen
Mi khat in sik kuaitan zolo ding ahih leh leilu lama sik leh sumngo kihel khawm kuaitan zozaw ding ahi hiam
Topa in, “Na gamsung tenga na bawl uh mawhna khempeuhte' hangin na neih na lam uh leh na sum na paite uh man ngahloin na galte uh ka tuahsakmang ding hi
Na theih ngeiloh uh gam khatah na galte uh' na ka hong semsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna mei bangin kitawhkuang a, a mit nawn kei ding hi,” a hong ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Topa in Jeremiah A Ompihna Gen

verses.text: Tua ciangin keimah in: Topa aw, nang na thei hi. Hong phawk in la hong veh in. Kei a hong bawlsiate tungah phu hong laksak in. Ka galte tungah na lungduaina hangin kei' sihna ding piangsak kei in. Nangma hangin minsiatna a thuak ka hihlam hong thei in
Na thute in kei hong kem a, an bangin ka ne hi. Na thute kei-a' dingin kipahna leh lungdamna ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma minin kei hong kilo hi, aw, Topa, Vanglian Pasian aw
Mi gualnuam mawkmawkte tawh ka kikhawl kei a, zong ka lungdam khawm kei hi. Nangma thu kong man'na hangin kei tangkai ka hih manin a hehin ka omden hi
Bang hangin ka natna dai theilo a, ka liamna dam theilo a, dam nuam hetlo ahi hiam? Tui a kang lui tawh kibangin lungkiatna hong thuaksak ding na hi hiam, ka ci hi

Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Na hong kilehkik leh kong koihna ngei-ah kong koihkik ding a, ka na na sem kik ding hi. Thu manphalo genloin thu manpha bek na gen leh, ka kamsang dingin ka hong zang ding hi. Nang kiangah amaute hong pai ding uh a, nang na hih leh amau' kiangah na pai kei ding hi

Hih mite tungah sumngo a kibawl khuakulhpi kong bangsak ding a, amaute in a hong sim uh hangin a hong zo kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a hong honkhia ding leh a hong suaktasak dingin nang ka hong ompih hi, Topa in ka hong ci hi
Migilote' khutsung panin nang kong suaktasak ding a, mi lauhuaite' khutsung panin nang kong honkhia ding hi,” a hong ci hi.
